H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
⊢ ∀ (m : ℂ) (x : H),
    { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha (m • x) y) f,
        map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ } =
      (starRingEnd ℂ) m •
        { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f,
          map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ }
